mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pol_policy WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM pol_policy WHERE policy_code = #{policyCode} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pol_policy ( tenant_id, policy_code, name, description, policy_version, rules_json, effective_from, effective_to, active, created_at, updated_at, version ) VALUES ( #{p.tenantId}, #{p.policyCode}, #{p.name}, #{p.description}, COALESCE(#{p.policyVersion}, '1.0'), #{p.rulesJson, typeHandler=com.tulip.common.data.handler.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{p.effectiveFrom}, #{p.effectiveTo}, COALESCE(#{p.active}, true), now(), now(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE pol_policy SET name = COALESCE(#{p.name}, name), description = COALESCE(#{p.description}, description), policy_version = COALESCE(#{p.policyVersion}, policy_version), rules_json = CASE WHEN #{p.rulesJson, typeHandler=com.tulip.common.data.handler.JsonbTypeHandler} IS NULL THEN rules_json ELSE #{p.rulesJson, typeHandler=com.tulip.common.data.handler.JsonbTypeHandler} END, effective_from = COALESCE(#{p.effectiveFrom}, effective_from), effective_to = COALESCE(#{p.effectiveTo}, effective_to), active = COALESCE(#{p.active}, active), updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{p.id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pol_policy_assignment WHERE policy_id = #{policyId}

SELECT p.* FROM pol_policy p JOIN pol_policy_assignment a ON a.policy_id = p.id WHERE p.policy_code = #{policyCode} AND p.active = true AND (p.effective_from IS NULL OR p.effective_from <= CURRENT_DATE) AND (p.effective_to IS NULL OR p.effective_to >= CURRENT_DATE) AND ( (a.target_type = #{targetType} AND a.target_id = #{targetId}) OR a.target_type = 'GLOBAL' ) ORDER BY CASE a.target_type WHEN 'LIBRARY' THEN 1 WHEN 'MEMBER_TYPE' THEN 2 WHEN 'MATERIAL_TYPE' THEN 3 WHEN 'GLOBAL' THEN 9 ELSE 5 END ASC, COALESCE(a.priority, 0) DESC, p.id DESC
